cases.prompt_body: Vertical restrained editorial evidence still of a shallow archive tray holding many identical blank matte record folders and unmarked separators, one folder edge slightly forward to imply repeated completed operations, neutral institutional light, no readable text, no numbers, no mission patches, no logos, no vehicle image, no launch spectacle.

cases.archetype: orderly repeated operational records as confidence
cases.prompt_body: Vertical institutional still of perfectly aligned blank operational record sleeves clipped into a dull metal rail, the repeated order feels stable and overconfident, controlled neutral light, calm locked frame, no readable text, no check marks, no logos, no mission identifiers, no spacecraft picture, no explosion.

Vertical source-grounded technical evidence still of a single short cut black rubber seal segment on a plain neutral evidence surface, two flat cut ends visible, one rough dark eroded edge exposed, a dull flat metal coupon nearby only as scale context, the object clearly reads as a cut sample representation and not a complete O-ring or recovered flight part, neutral lab evidence light, no labels, no documents, no diagrams, no readable markings, no logos.

Vertical source-grounded close technical still of a static metal-and-rubber seal interface test article, black rubber compressed between two dull machined metal faces, a thin dark residue shadow along the contact seam suggests a blow-by path, the carrier reads as a controlled representation rather than flight hardware, restrained neutral light, no glow, no flame, no smoke, no labels, no diagrams, no readable markings.

Vertical source-grounded cold evidence still of several short straight cut black rubber seal segments resting in an unmarked dull metal test tray, each segment has a small dark distress mark, faint frost beads sit only on the tray edge, the objects read as cut samples rather than complete rings or flight hardware, no labels, no readable documents, no diagrams, no logos.

cases.archetype: warning reduced to non-readable process item
cases.prompt_body: Vertical restrained administrative evidence still where one small dark-edged evidence marker is nearly buried among larger blank folders and matte process cards, the warning is present but visually reduced to an ordinary line item, neutral institutional light, no actual writing, no labels, no charts, no captions, no logos, no poster layout.

Vertical restrained late-night institutional still of a generic teleconference table with two plain unbranded desk phones and a blank engineering recommendation packet placed apart from a larger blank process folder, the objection enters the process without showing people, exact rooms, readable memos, quotes, logos, whiteboard writing, or agency marks.

Vertical locked institutional still of an asymmetric blank decision table, a small dark warning marker on one side and a larger unmarked process block shifted toward it, burden carried by object placement and empty space rather than words, no readable text, no scales-of-justice symbol, no logos, no people, no whiteboard.

Vertical restrained decision-table still with a blank safety-evidence packet centered under a plain unmarked metal weight, a small warning marker held outside the center of judgment, matching neutral institutional light, no readable documents, no labels, no quotes, no logos, no exact room, no people.

cases.archetype: process weight shifted toward warning marker
cases.prompt_body: Vertical restrained decision-table still using the same blank process objects as the prior burden shot, the larger unmarked weight now presses toward the small dark warning marker, the inversion is shown through geometry and shadow only, no readable text, no labels, no quote cards, no logos, no people, no poster design.

Vertical source-grounded close material evidence still of anonymous unbranded industrial steel and concrete, a cropped steel pipe support and concrete ledge in pale neutral morning light, thin frost and small ice beads visible on the surfaces, cold reads as a restrained material condition on infrastructure rather than a dramatic scene, no full launch tower, no vehicle, no flag, no colored cloth, no fog, no blue monochrome, no readable markings, no logos.

Vertical restrained institutional still of a small dark evidence edge partly visible beneath a larger blank process folder, the warning is clearly present but not centered, calm neutral light, no readable document, no labels, no captions, no logos, no poster text, no explosion, no recovered hardware.

cases.archetype: precise cut seal segment with blank process mass
cases.prompt_body: Vertical source-grounded institutional evidence still of one short straight cut black rubber seal segment with two visible flat cut ends and one dark eroded edge, placed beside the corner of a larger blank stack of matte paper and card blocks, the small rubber segment remains the only material cause while the blank process mass visually outweighs it, neutral table surface, no text, no labels, no diagrams, no complete ring, no debris, no ash, no soot fragments, no recovered hardware, no explosion.
